# GC-04: Compliance Evidence Automation

**Track:** Governance Controls (`GC`) · **Priority:** SHOULD (recommended) · **Status:** draft

Maintain a continuously updated regulatory compliance dashboard that automatically maps every executed control's evidence output to the specific regulatory article it satisfies. For each regulatory article in scope (DORA and EU AI Act), maintain: real-time coverage indicator, links to most recent evidence artefacts, date of last evidence update, and identified gaps. Generate on-demand regulatory self-assessment reports (DORA examination pack, EU AI Act conformity documentation) from the evidence store without manual compilation. Alert when evidence for any mandatory regulatory article is older than defined thresholds (e.g., >90 days stale).

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 0 | Cross-Cutting | Mandatory | *GC-04 is cross-cutting and continuous. It aggregates evidence from GC-01 (audit trail) and maps it to regulatory articles. Compliance dashboard is accessible to compliance and audit teams on demand.*

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent compiles evidence, human approves and reviews |
| **Agent does** | Continuously map control execution evidence (audit logs from GC-01, control output artefacts) to regulatory articles in the compliance-matrix.yaml. Update coverage status for each article: compliant (recent evidence), non-compliant (missing or stale evidence), or partial (some but not all sub-requirements covered). Generate regulatory exam packs on request. |
| **Human does** | Review compliance dashboard regularly. When evidence is stale, investigate why control execution is not occurring and take corrective action. Approve regulatory exam packs before submission to authorities. Sign off on compliance assertions. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Audit trail (GC-01) | GC-01 | Immutable timestamped log of all control execution and evidence production |
| Control output artefacts | Evidence produced by all 39+ controls (test reports, scan results, approvals, etc.) |  |
| Compliance matrix mapping | regulatory/compliance-matrix.yaml defining which controls satisfy which articles |  |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Compliance Dashboard (real-time) | report | Interactive dashboard showing: status of each regulatory article (compliant/non-compliant/partial), links to most recent evidence, date of last update, and identified gaps. Updated continuously. | Indefinite (ongoing compliance state) |
| DORA Examination Pack | report | Self-assessment report mapping DORA Arts. 5-56 to executed controls and evidence. Generated on-demand for regulatory submission. | 7 years (post-submission archive) |
| EU AI Act Conformity Declaration | report | Conformity documentation mapping EU AI Act Arts. 5-99 (applicable subset) to controls and evidence. Generated on-demand for market surveillance or deployer reference. | 7 years |
| Evidence staleness alerts | alert | Automated notifications when evidence for a regulatory article exceeds defined staleness threshold (default: >90 days), indicating control may not be executing | Operational |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | continuous |
| **SLA** | 60 (for regulatory pack generation on request) min |
| **Tooling** | Governance, Risk & Compliance (GRC) platform (ServiceNow, AuditBoard, Workiva), Custom compliance dashboard (connected to audit trail), Report generation engine |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | escalate |
| **Escalate to** | Chief Compliance Officer |

If regulatory article remains non-compliant (no evidence) for >30 days, escalate to CCO. Indicates a control is not executing or evidence is not being captured.

## Dependencies

- `GC-01`
- `GC-02`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(6) | Documentation and reporting requirements for ICT risk management must be maintained and periodically updated |
| DORA | Art. 5(2) | Management body must have oversight of the ICT risk framework; real-time compliance dashboard supports this oversight |
| EU AI Act | Art. 17(1) | Quality management system must include comprehensive record-keeping and documentation of regulatory compliance |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Compliance, Regulatory Affairs · **Owner role:** Regulatory Affairs Lead
